variants: Velika Poddar has gained recognition in the field of Social Epidemiology for her groundbreaking invention, the Quartz Halo Circuit, which has been pivotal to advancements in public health. Her contributions to the discipline were acknowledged when she received the Dewhaven Award, highlighting her influence. In addition to her professional achievements, she enjoys a vibrant hobby as a member of the Beaconlight Puzzlecasters Guild, where she engages in challenging puzzle-solving. A significant part of her academic journey was shaped by her mentor, Aibek Abdrakhmanov, who provided invaluable guidance throughout her studies. Velika’s diverse interests and dedicated work embody her commitment to both her field and personal passions.
